articles.author: Mathieu Pollet
articles.title: EU plots long game against US digital supremacy - politico.eu
articles.description: The European Commission’s so-called tech sovereignty plan aims to boost domestic champions rather than shut out American competitors.
articles.content: Brussels itself says EU countries spend 264 billion a year on American tech, with three U.S. giants Microsoft, Google and Amazon dominating the cloud services market that underlies everything from em… [+1372 chars]

articles.title: Ötzi the Iceman and his microbiome—a 5,300-year-old relationship - Phys.org
articles.description: Researchers at Eurac Research have obtained a detailed picture of the microbial community associated with Ötzi, Europe's oldest known natural human mummy. The study provides insights into a complex microbiome, ranging from the gut flora of a Copper Age human …
